component.name: ChannelItem
component.script:
sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("bg") m.bar = m.top.findNode("bar") m.num = m.top.findNode("num") m.nam = m.top.findNode("nam") end sub
sub onContent() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then return m.num.text = c.number m.nam.text = c.title applyFocus(m.top.focusBitmapUri <> "") end sub
sub onFocus() applyFocus(m.top.focusBitmapUri <> "") end sub
sub applyFocus(focused as Boolean) if focused m.bg.color = "0x1e1c16ff" m.bar.visible = true m.num.color = "0xd4c090ff" m.nam.color = "0xd4cfc7ff" else m.bg.color = "0x111111ff" m.bar.visible = false c = m.top.itemContent if c <> invalid and c.isSubchannel = true m.num.color = "0x5a5040ff" m.nam.color = "0x555555ff" else m.num.color = "0x8a7a5aff" m.nam.color = "0x777777ff" end if end if end sub
